mapper.select:
select p.id as id, p.name as name, p.type as type, p.risk_level as riskLevel, p.strategy_code as strategyCode, p.feature_tags as featureTagsText, nav.nav as latestNav, nav.cum_return as latestCumReturn
order by p.updated_at desc, p.id desc limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}

select p.id as id, p.name as name, p.type as type, p.risk_level as riskLevel, p.strategy_code as strategyCode, p.feature_tags as featureTagsText, v.id as versionId, v.version_no as versionNo, v.base_info_json as baseInfoJson, v.params_json as paramsJson from advisor_product p inner join advisor_product_version v on v.product_id = p.id and v.version_no = p.published_version_no where p.id = #{productId} and p.status = 'PUBLISHED' limit 1
select date_format(nav_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as navDate, nav as nav, cum_return as cumReturn from advisor_product_nav where product_id = #{productId} order by nav_date asc
select date_format(snapshot_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as snapshotDate, holding_json as holdingJson from advisor_product_holding_snapshot where product_id = #{productId} order by snapshot_date desc limit 1
select count(1) from advisor_product where id = #{productId} and status = 'PUBLISHED' and published_version_no is not null
